message:
feat(ui): Add 'y' shortcut to copy ID in shortcuts sidebar

Add documentation for the 'y' keyboard shortcut (copy ID) to the
shortcuts sidebar in both the list view and detail view sections.
This improves discoverability of the copy functionality.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -158,6 +158,7 @@ func (s *ShortcutsSidebar) allSections() []shortcutSection {
 				{"h/l", "Columns ←/→"},
 				{"j/k", "Items ↓/↑"},
 				{"Tab", "Toggle detail"},
+				{"y", "Copy ID"},
 				{"^j/^k", "Scroll detail"},
 				{"Enter", "Full view"},
 			},
@@ -179,6 +180,7 @@ func (s *ShortcutsSidebar) allSections() []shortcutSection {
 			items: []shortcutItem{
 				{"t/T", "Time-travel"},
 				{"x", "Export .md"},
+				{"y", "Copy ID"},
 				{"C", "Copy"},
 				{"O", "Open in $EDITOR"},
 				{"'", "Recipe picker"},
